form.formComment: Resuming after a eight months break. Finished off last campaign fifth of 9 at Galway August 3 over 1408m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Joltin with 55.5kg at $5. On debut fifth of 15 at this track July 17 over 1408m, 3.5 len behind Time Bender carrying 54kg at $12. Likely improver who can start this prep in a strong way.

form.formComment: Third race start today. At debut, 4th of 14 at Dundalk All Weather on February 20 over 1609m, 6 len behind Lady In Gold with 58.5kg at $15. Last start 5th of 14 at Dundalk All Weather on March 6 over 1609m, 4 len behind Son Of Beauty carrying 58.5kg at $12. Key runner who can get off the mark.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation seventh of 16 at Cork September 30 over 1609m, 9 len behind Bloom carrying 58kg at $126. On debut 13th of 15 at Naas August 24 over 1408m, 10 len behind Caught U Sleeping with 56.5kg at $15. Worth another chance this prep.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At debut, 5th of 14 at Dundalk All Weather on January 30 over 1609m, 5 len behind Handshake with 58.5kg at $9. Second-up 4th of 13 at Dundalk All Weather on February 27 over 2112m, 4 len behind Sutton Hoo carrying 58.5kg at $13. Well placed and gets her chance to break through.
